meaning: [史]加纳王国(公元4至13世纪时的西非古国)
examples: Sad as the scene was, the humans, not Gana, were the only ones crying.
Photographs of Gana, looking stricken and inconsolable, attracted crowds to the zoo.
In 2008, at a German zoo, a gorilla named Gana gave birth to a male infant, who died after three months.
GANA's current top candidate, Alejandro Giamattei, is only in third position for the coming elections.
The current president, Oscar Rafael Berger Promo, has enjoyed the support of the center-right coalition Gran Alianza Nacional (GANA).
